title: ProjectClassDefinition
description: Plan §A.S4 — schema for `config/project-classes/<id>.yaml`. The ProjectClassRegistry loader validates each YAML against this schema before deserialization. Each class declares its display name, the prompt addendum surfaced after `prompt_role.txt`, optional per-role addenda, and the routing metadata downstream consumers (taxonomy loader, container policy, BCO emit) read.

id.description: Stable class id (e.g. `clinical_trial`, `time_series_forecast`). Lowercase + underscores. Matches the wire format the closed `ProjectClass` enum's `as_str()` returns; the file stem must equal this id.

display_name.description: Human-readable name surfaced in SME-facing UI (e.g. "Bioinformatics", "Clinical Trial").

prompt_addendum_path.description: Optional path (relative to the crate root) of the class-specific prompt addendum that the conversation crate appends after `prompt_role.txt`. When omitted, no addendum is loaded. The path resolves at registry-load time so missing files surface as a typed error.

taxonomy_pattern.description: glob pattern (relative to `config/stage-taxonomies/`) the taxonomy loader uses when looking up taxonomies for this class.

requires_container.description: When true, taxonomies in this class must declare a `preferred_container`. Bio is grandfathered (false); clinical_trial / time_series_forecast typically declare a hardened image.

auto_bco.description: When true, the emitter unconditionally writes a Biocompute Object alongside the package. Default false.

interpretation_policy_override.description: Optional path of a per-class `interpretation-policy.<class>.json` that overrides the default policy. When omitted, the loader uses the modality-level policy.

role_addenda.description: Plan §A.S4 Decision 2 — per-role prompt fragments. Keys are AtomRole variants in PascalCase (e.g. `Validation`, `Pilot`); values are paths to addendum files. The conversation crate concatenates the per-role addendum onto the per-class block when an atom of that role is in the composition.
